Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Wei clan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — The Wei clan uses a White Fox as its symbol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — The Wei clan accounts for over a hundred thousand of the people in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The Wei clan is negotiating trade rights with the Kazan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The Wei clan's motto is 'Honor by any means'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The Path of the Wei clan uses madra of light and dreams to deceive enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The Wei clan was founded on the contradiction that deception can be used to serve honor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Most buildings in the Wei clan are purple and white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The colors of the Wei clan buildings reflect the purple leaves of the orus tree and the white fur of the snowfox.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — The Wei clan was created by Elder Whisper and the clan founders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — The Wei clan members meditate and cycle every morning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — The most prominent families of the Wei clan gather before the Hall of Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — The Wei clan celebrated Kelsa's advancement to Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — The Wei are identified by a white fox with five tails on their banners and always match white with purple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — The Wei clan feels pride watching the coordinated masterpiece of White Fox madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — The Wei clan has outdone their rivals in hospitality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — The Wei clan wants a broad audience for the Seven-Year Festival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — The Wei clan is an ally of the Heaven's Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Wei Jin Sairus leads the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — The Wei are a clan that has children who learn to swim in the Dragon River.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — The Wei clan has a treasure hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — The Wei clan has elders who reward killing Kazan Irons.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — The Wei clan is a clan that Lindon belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — The Patriarch of the Wei clan is a leader within the clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — The Wei clan treats Unsouled in a certain way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — The Wei clan specializes in illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The Wei clan is located in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The Wei clan uses specific types of wardrobes.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Wei clan has simple exercises for Unsouled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Wei clan practices a Path of dreams and light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — The Wei clan has a Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — In the Wei clan, everyone learns to read before learning their first Foundation technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Wei clan shines colored lights into the night sky during festivals and holidays.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The Wei clan provided Lindon with space.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Wei clan has exiles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The person mentioned was an exile of the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — The Wei clan is located northeast of the valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Seisha's hair is a deep brown unique to the clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Wei clan is a group Lindon plans to visit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Wei clan has walls that are about thirty feet tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Wei clan territory has gates that were recently changed with freshly carved and decorated doors for the last Seven-Year Festival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Wei clan contains members known as Irons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Wei clan members wear iron or copper badges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Wei clan is a clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Wei clan was whipped into action by its elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Wei clan uses a massive chain of scripted goldsteel to reinforce boundary fields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Wei clan put up a boundary field around Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon wonders if the Titan crushed the Wei clan to rubble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Dreadgod waded into the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon wanted to return to the Wei clan with great power.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon grew up in the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Wei clan has Jades that can coordinate for festival displays.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Several members of the Wei clan have reached Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Windfall rests on the former site of the Wei clan.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The former site of the Wei clan was covered in white and purple wreckage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth challenges the Wei clan.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Wei clan's new First Elder is the sister of the previous Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Wei clan uses purple-and-white symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Wei clan has a reputation for underhanded tactics.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
